title: DuDuClaw CONTRACT.toml
description: Behavioral boundary definition for a DuDuClaw agent. See docs/spec/contract-toml-spec.md for full specification.

must_not.description: Patterns or substrings the agent must NEVER output. Supports glob wildcards (*, ?, [range]).

must_always.description: Behaviors the agent must ALWAYS exhibit. Used for red-team testing and system prompt injection.

max_tool_calls_per_turn.description: Maximum MCP tool calls per response turn. 0 = unlimited.

browser.description: Browser automation capability configuration. Omit to use system defaults (deny-by-default).

enabled.description: Enable browser automation for this agent

trusted_domains.description: Allowlist of domain patterns (supports glob). If set, only these domains are accessible.

blocked_domains.description: Blocklist of domain patterns (supports glob). Always rejected.

allow_form_submit.description: Can the agent submit HTML forms?

max_pages_per_session.description: Maximum pages visited per browser session

max_session_minutes.description: Maximum duration of a browser session in minutes

require_human_approval_for.description: Action types requiring human sign-off before execution. Supports glob patterns.

computer_use.description: Layer 5 (Computer Use) configuration. Only applies when max_tier = 'computer_use'.

enabled.description: Must be explicitly enabled for L5

container_required.description: Require container sandbox for Computer Use

blur_patterns.description: CSS selectors to blur in screenshots for privacy
